source_sniff.notes: Title matches aside from capitalization. The model index author field appears to list Taylor, John B.; the paper itself lists John C. Williams as the third author, so this is recorded as a metadata author issue for later index review.

spans: Section II five-model overview and benchmark federal funds rule equation (4)
Section III determinacy discussion for FRB and other models
Section IV loss function equation (5) and optimized-rule Table 3
Section VI average-loss equation (6), Table 9, and robust rule equation (7)

formula_quality.reason: The paper gives the forecast-based policy and evaluation equations but not the full FRB-US structural equation system. Detailed FRB-US equations are only available through the implementation cross-check and require source-level FRB-US documentation review.

runtime_validation.notes: Current phase is private derivation extraction only; the user explicitly said not to run Dynare.

copyright_boundary: The derivation summarizes model structure and equations. It does not copy long prose from the paper.
